name: bmw-msrp
description: Fetches all current BMW China (bmw.com.cn) MSRP prices by model and trim. Returns prices in 万元.
author: MSRP Skill

input_schema.description: No inputs required. Scrapes live data from bmw.com.cn.

model.description: Model name in Chinese, e.g. BMW 3系

trim.description: Trim name in Chinese, e.g. 325Li M运动套装
